items.title: Written practice
items.body:
Translate the workbook prompts into English. Use the patterns you studied.

Examples:
• Eu preciso ajudar minha filha de manhã.
• Eu não trabalho no centro, mas eu quero ir com você.
• Você quer ir à praia nos fins de semana?
• Não tenho dinheiro hoje, mas quero comprar isto.
• Gosto de falar inglês com meu chefe.

items.prompt: I prefer to speak English. I don’t speak Spanish.
items.answer: Do you prefer to speak English or Spanish?

items.prompt: 7- Do you like to drink tea or coffee in the morning? / juice-tea / juice – coffee
items.answer: 6- Do you eat popcorn at the movies? / candy / chocolate

items.prompt: , but I don’t want to go to the movies.

items.text: Do you prefer to speak English or Spanish?
6- Do you eat popcorn at the movies? / candy / chocolate
Do you prefer to speak English or Spanish?
